7B.name: 7B
7B.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on trains timed to arrive:

  • London Terminals before 04:30 and after 09:59;
  • Stratford (London) before 04:30 and after 09:49.

Valid on trains timed to depart:

  • London Terminals (except those below) before 04:30 and after 09:29;
  • London Kings Cross before 04:30 and after 09:29 and before 16:29 and after 18:34;
  • London Euston before 04:30 and after 08:44 and before 16:44 and after 19:00;
  • Moorgate or pass through London St Pancras International before 04:30 and after 09:29 and before 17:30 and after 18:30;
  • Stratford (London) before 04:30 and after 09:29;.
  • London Paddington before 04:30 and after 09:19; but not to any station on long-distance services (to Plymouth, Bristol, Cardiff, Worcester or Cheltenham Spa and beyond) between 16:01 and 18:59.
restrictions.returnHtml:
Valid on trains timed to arrive:

  • London Terminals before 04:30 and after 09:59;
  • Stratford (London) before 04:30 and after 09:49.

Valid on trains timed to depart:

  • London Terminals (except those below) before 04:30 and after 09:29;
  • London Kings Cross before 04:30 and after 09:29 and before 16:29 and after 18:34;
  • London Euston before 04:30 and after 08:44 and before 16:44 and after 19:00;
  • Moorgate or pass through London St Pancras International before 04:30 and after 09:29 and before 17:30 and after 18:30;
  • Stratford (London) before 04:30 and after 09:29;.
  • London Paddington before 04:30 and after 09:19; but not to any station on long-distance services (to Plymouth, Bristol, Cardiff, Worcester or Cheltenham Spa and beyond) between 16:01 and 18:59.

7E.applicableDaysText:

 Mondays to Fridays
7E.notesHtml:
Journeys to London Paddington please use restrictions,4N,5K,GK,LC,LD,WH,WV,WX.

If travel is NOT to/via the stations listed above or Peterborough, see restriction code2V
7E.notesText:
Journeys to London Paddington please use restrictions, 4N , 5K , GK , LC , LD , WH , WV , WX .
 If travel is NOT to/via the stations listed above or Peterborough , see restriction code 2V

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to arrive:

  • LondonEuston after 07:19 and before 11:30;
  • LondonKings Cross after 04:29 and before 10:08;
  • London St Pancras International after 04:29 and before 10:02;
  • Bedford after 04:29 and before 09:30;
  • Luton orLuton Airport Parkway after 04:29 and before 10:02;
  • Stevenage after 03:59 and before 09:57.
restrictions.returnHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart:

  • LondonEuston after 04:29 and before 09:26 or after 15:00 and before 18:45;
  • London St Pancras International after 04:29 and before 08:46 or after 16:36 and before 18:46
  • Bedford after 04:29 and before 09:01;
  • Luton orLuton Airport Parkway after 04:29 and before 09:01 or after 16:29 and before 18:59;
  • London Kings Cross Mondays to Thursdays after 06:44 and before 07:59 or after 15:57 and before 17:46 - or Fridays after 06:44 and before 07:59.
